> **OPERATIONAL NOTE**: this run completed but only floki's
> workload data made it back to the lead. arnold/nuc/meh
> teardown SSHs all timed out at 60s; rsync of remote logs
> failed; only floki's local-copy logs are present. The
> remotes were under operational pressure (separate workload
> on meh; uncertain on arnold; nuc went unreachable
> mid-run). The redis success rate below (99.18%) is
> floki-only, but is a strong signal that the heredoc fix
> + retry-backoff + retry-on-Closed:2 default are working
> as intended (compare: pass-5 floki redis was 90.8%,
> pass-4 floki redis was 91% across 4 hosts aggregate).
>
> Investigation item: a snapshot probe of meh during the
> run caught dynomited at 1781% CPU briefly. The process
> recovered (chaos kill cycle terminated it) but the tight
> loop is worth root-causing. Filed in
> `docs/journal/2026-05-27-pass-6-postmortem.md`.
